## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔧 Dependency update
- [ ] 🏗️ Build/CI changes
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactoring

### For Reviewers

#### Dependency Update Review Checklist

- [ ] Update type is appropriate (patch/minor for auto-merge, major for manual review)
- [ ] No security vulnerabilities introduced
- [ ] Breaking changes properly documented and handled
- [ ] CI pipeline passes completely
- [ ] No unexpected behavior in testing

#### Security Considerations

- [ ] No new security vulnerabilities
- [ ] Dependencies from trusted sources
- [ ] License compatibility maintained
- [ ] No exposure of sensitive data
